Theme: Infographic / The Startup Scaling S-Curve — Key Metrics by Stage
Title: The Startup Scaling S-Curve | Metrics That Matter by Stage 2026
Description: Save this for your startup metrics and founder strategy board. Your metrics should change as you scale. Most founders track the wrong things. This is what healthy metrics look like at each stage. Save this. #StartupMetrics #Founder #SaaSGrowth #MetricsDashboard #StartupLife #DataDriven #BuildInPublic
Alt Text: Dark technical infographic showing S-curve graph with 4 startup stages, different metrics highlighted at each stage, deep charcoal background with amber-gold highlights, clean minimalist design, ascending curve showing growth trajectory
AI Prompt: Clean editorial infographic, 9:16 vertical, Style B Dynamic Viral. Background: deep charcoal. Title in bold white: THE STARTUP SCALING S-CURVE — Key Metrics by Stage. Below, an S-curve graph showing 4 distinct stages: STAGE 1 (0-100 users): Metrics: Activation rate (%), Churn (%), Feature adoption. Focus: Does the product work? Is it valuable? STAGE 2 (100-1000 users): Metrics: MRR growth (% MoM), CAC (cost), LTV (lifetime value). Focus: Is the model repeatable? STAGE 3 (1000-10k users): Metrics: CAC payback period (months), Rule of 40 (Growth % + Margin %). Focus: Can we scale profitably? STAGE 4 (10k+ users): Metrics: NRR (net revenue retention %), ARR (annual recurring revenue), Burn rate (months runway). Focus: Are we building something lasting? Each stage has different colored emphasis (amber for most critical). Footer: Wrong metrics = wrong decisions. Track what matters at your stage. Colour: charcoal, amber, white. No photography.

Theme: Infographic / The Series A Negotiation Framework — Founder Leverage
Title: Series A Term Sheet Negotiation Framework | Know Your Leverage 2026
Description: Save this for your fundraising preparation and founder board. Most founders accept the first offer. Know your leverage. These are the 5 terms that matter. Negotiate these. #Fundraising #SeriesA #TermSheet #Founder #SaaSFunding #Negotiation #BuildInPublic
Alt Text: Dark negotiation framework infographic showing 5 critical term sheet elements to negotiate with win/lose indicators, deep charcoal background with green-amber-red negotiation zones, clean business decision format
AI Prompt: Clean editorial infographic, 9:16 vertical, Style B Dynamic Viral. Background: deep charcoal. Title in bold white: 5 TERM SHEET TERMS TO NEGOTIATE — Know Your Leverage. Subtitle in amber: Most founders don't negotiate. You should. Below, 5 terms each with negotiation strategy: 1. VALUATION (Green if 3-5x more than last round growth). Negotiation tip: Your growth rate is your leverage. Don't negotiate down. 2. DILUTION (Amber if 18-25%). If under 18%, that's a win. Over 25%, push back hard. 3. PRO-RATA RIGHTS (Green if included). This preserves your ownership in future rounds. Critical. 4. BOARD COMPOSITION (Green if founder maintains board seat + 1 independent director). Red if 2 investor seats + 1 founder seat (you're minority). 5. LIQUIDATION PREFERENCES (Amber if 1x non-participating). Red if 1x participating (investor gets 1x back before you). 1x non-participating is fair. Footer in amber: Bad terms last 10 years. Negotiate carefully. Colour: charcoal, green-amber-red, white. No photography.
